political.s: FEC: $180K in executive political donations; partisan lean Democratic +37 across 8 executive donors.

labor.s: Via parent company Gap Inc.: 12 federal penalties totaling $6.0M since 2000 (Violation Tracker). Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 60/100; Fashion Rev 42%; TVPRA exposure; UK MS statement; AU MS statement.

privacy.s: Via parent company Gap Inc.: Wikidata records a notable event: Gap Inc. 2007 data breach. (Wikidata Q420822)

wiki.extract: Yeezy Gap was a fashion collaboration between Kanye West's Yeezy and the American clothing company Gap announced in June 2020, with its first wave of clothing releasing a year later in June 2021. In January 2022, the brand announced its collaboration with luxury fashion house Balenciaga, with the first collection from that line releasing the following month. Yeezy Gap was terminated two years after its announcement in September 2022 after a series of disagreements between West and Gap executives. West independently released products from the Yeezy Gap line in February 2024, without permission

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy

health.s: Via parent company Gap Inc.: 11 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the detachable tissue box toy can come apart.
